title: CVE-2026-11348: HAVELSAN Inc. Cryptographic Signature Vulnerability
summary: [P1] HAVELSAN Inc. is vulnerable to improper verification of cryptographic signatures, which could allow attackers to exploit the system. No patch is currently available. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): None (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: The vulnerability affects the cryptographic signature verification in HAVELSAN Inc.

enrichment.lede: CISA Adds Three Known Exploited Vulnerabilities to Catalog.

title: CVE-2026-13696: LDAP Injection Vulnerability
summary: [P1] LDAP is vulnerable to improper neutralization of special elements used in an LDAP query, which could allow attackers to inject malicious code. No patch is currently available. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): None (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: The vulnerability affects the LDAP query processing

enrichment.lede: CISA Adds Three Known Exploited Vulnerabilities to Catalog.
